description: Represents a CodeBuild sandbox, an ephemeral compute environment started from a CodeBuild project.

Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the sandbox.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Id.markdownDescription:
The ID of the sandbox.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ProjectName.markdownDescription:
The CodeBuild project name.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Update requires: Replacement

Status.markdownDescription:
The status of the sandbox.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

RequestTime.description: When the sandbox process was initially requested, expressed in ISO 8601 format.
RequestTime.markdownDescription:
When the sandbox process was initially requested, expressed in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

StartTime.description: When the sandbox process started, expressed in ISO 8601 format.
StartTime.markdownDescription:
When the sandbox process started, expressed in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

EncryptionKey.description: The KMS key used for encrypting the sandbox output artifacts.
EncryptionKey.markdownDescription:
The KMS key used for encrypting the sandbox output artifacts.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ServiceRole.description: The name of a service role used for this sandbox.
ServiceRole.markdownDescription:

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1

Read only property: Yes

TimeoutInMinutes.description: How long, in minutes, for CodeBuild to wait before timing out this sandbox.
